task_text: Enter customer order details into the CRM every time a new order form is submitted.
Copy data from incoming email attachments into a spreadsheet daily.
Update inventory counts in the database whenever a shipment arrives.
Merge daily CSV exports from three different tools into one master spreadsheet.
Enter 50 new customer records into the database every Monday morning.
Sync new leads from the web form into the CRM in real time.
Transcribe handwritten order forms into the online ordering system each afternoon.
Send a confirmation email automatically when a customer completes checkout.
Send a reminder email to customers whose invoice is 7 days overdue.
Send a welcome email with onboarding instructions to every new signup.
Send an email newsletter to the subscriber list once a week.
Reply to customers asking for a tracking number with their current shipment status.
Respond to common customer support questions using a set of template answers, escalating anything unusual.
Follow up with customers who abandoned their shopping cart, adjusting the message based on the product.
Monitor a shared inbox and forward emails to the right department based on keywords.
Persuade a hesitant client to sign a renewal contract during an in-person meeting.
Negotiate final pricing terms with a key enterprise client over a call.
Schedule a recurring calendar invite every Monday for the team standup.
Schedule client meetings by checking calendar availability and proposing three time slots.
Book a conference room automatically whenever a meeting is created in the calendar.
Send a calendar reminder to attendees 24 hours before every scheduled meeting.
Reschedule a meeting after negotiating a new time directly with a difficult client.
Review and approve time-off requests based on team coverage rules.
Generate an invoice automatically when a project is marked complete.
Reconcile bank transactions against the accounting ledger every day.
Convert uploaded PDF invoices into structured line items in the accounting system.
Match incoming payments to open invoices in the accounting system, escalating unmatched ones.
Calculate monthly payroll based on hours logged in the timesheet system.
Approve routine expense reports under $100 based on standard policy.
Review vendor invoices against purchase orders and flag mismatches for a human to resolve.
Decide whether to write off a disputed invoice after speaking with the client.
Generate a weekly sales report by pulling numbers from the database and formatting them into a template.
Pull daily website traffic numbers from analytics and paste them into a tracking sheet.
Run a nightly script that checks for duplicate entries in the customer database.
Write a short summary of customer feedback trends each month for the product team.
Summarize weekly team updates into a report, adding commentary on notable blockers.
Compile quarterly board deck slides and add strategic commentary on company direction.
Check server uptime status every hour and log the result.
Update the shared spreadsheet with new sales figures 3 times a day.
Review flagged transactions and mark them as approved or fraudulent based on a set of rules.
Screen incoming resumes for required keywords before passing them to a hiring manager.
Triage incoming support tickets into priority levels based on customer tier and issue type.
Categorize expense reports into budget categories and flag ones that need manager review.
Assign new support tickets to the right team member based on workload and expertise.
Auto-tag support tickets based on keywords in the subject line.
Archive completed support tickets older than 90 days.
Compare quotes from different vendors against a pricing rubric and recommend the cheapest compliant option.
Decide which of three competing vendor proposals best fits long-term company strategy.
Conduct a performance review and decide on a raise for a direct report.
Interview a candidate for a senior engineering role and assess culture fit.
Mediate a conflict between two team members about project ownership.
Mentor a junior employee through a difficult client situation.
Evaluate a sensitive HR complaint and determine appropriate next steps.
Have a difficult conversation with an underperforming employee about their future at the company.
Counsel an employee going through a personal hardship affecting their work.
Decide how to restructure the team after a department reorg.
Post the same social media update across Twitter, Facebook, and LinkedIn every morning.
Draft social media captions based on a content calendar, then have a teammate approve the tone.
Prepare a first draft of a contract from a template, filling in client-specific terms.
Coach a sales rep on how to handle a difficult prospect.
Design the overall visual identity and branding direction for a new product line.
Craft the company's response strategy to a PR crisis.
Judge the creative quality of submitted client pitch decks and choose the best one.
Brainstorm a new product strategy for next year's roadmap with the leadership team.
Negotiate a multi-year lease renewal for the office space.
Decide on the final creative direction for the annual marketing campaign.
Back up the database every night at midnight.
Restart a failed automated job and log the incident whenever the monitoring system alerts.
Rotate API credentials on a fixed schedule every quarter.
Investigate a novel production outage with no matching runbook and design a fix.
